items.violation_hint: Digital watches in a remote tribe with minimal outside contact
Reinforced concrete didn't exist in 1243
Email didn't exist in Mozart's time
Helicopters weren't invented until decades later
Romans didn't use asphalt; they used volcanic cement and stone
Blogs didn't exist in the Renaissance
Solar panels in ancient Egypt
Diesel engines in the Viking age
Mechanic giving medical advice is unexpected
Plumber as key witness is unexpected
Janitor consulted on musical interpretation

Librarian performing surgery
Gift shop cashier consulted on rocket science
Cat involved in academic grading
Summary says costs decreased but data shows 5% increase
Sydney Opera House is in Australia, not Vienna
